description_long: This rifle features a compact, bullpup-style configuration with a prominent rectangular magazine well located behind the trigger group. The body is primarily matte black, with angular lines and a robust, utilitarian design. The barrel is short and thick, protruding slightly from the front, and the upper receiver includes a raised carry handle integrated with the sighting system. The pistol grip is steeply angled and positioned below the main body, while the stock is integrated into the rear housing, giving the weapon a streamlined silhouette. Minimal external controls and a lack of visible rails or attachments suggest a focus on simplicity and durability. The overall appearance is modern and tactical, suitable for urban environments where maneuverability is essential.
description: A compact, matte black bullpup rifle with a short barrel, integrated stock, and raised carry handle, designed for tactical use in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the short, thick barrel and the raised carry handle above the receiver.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bullpup configuration, rectangular magazine well, and angular stock integrated into the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the integrated stock and the back of the carry handle, with the magazine well visible below.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the pistol grip, magazine well, and the overall compact profile.
